Argument Reference

  • weight - (Optional) (Updatable) Load balancing policy weight assigned to the backend server.
  • backup - (Optional) (Updatable) Treat the backend server as a backup unit.
  • drain - (Optional) (Updatable) Drain the backend server before removing it from new traffic.
  • offline - (Optional) (Updatable) Mark the backend server offline.
  • ip_address - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • port - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • backend_set_name - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • load_balancer_id - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
